DEFENDANTS BANK OF AMERICA CORPORATION, MORTGAGE ELECTRONIC REGISTRATION SYSTEMS, INC., RECONSTRUST COMPANY, N.A.'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT - Transferred to Department 501, the Housing Court, to be heard on December 14, 2012.
